sentiment.reasoning: Presenting at a strategy symposium is a routine corporate event that rarely provides immediate material financial impact.

headlines.headline: Ulvon Renewables reports rising costs pressuring margins in automated logistics

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries names new head of process automation division

sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a standard leadership change that carries moderate uncertainty regarding future operational performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
